setup_instructions: 1. Save +34 644 59 66 20 as a contact in WhatsApp
2. Send the message:  I allow callmebot to send me messages
3. You will receive your API key back in a reply
4. Fill in your phone (international format, e.g. +201001234567) and apikey below
6. Run: bash agent/notify-whatsapp.sh 'Test message from New-Power agent'
